title: Prorated billing path ignores discounts
description: A project-owned semantic review case where one branch of a business-rule calculation omits the discount applied elsewhere.
diff:
diff --git a/src/billing.ts b/src/billing.ts
--- a/src/billing.ts
+++ b/src/billing.ts
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ export const totalDueCents = (items: readonly InvoiceItem[]): number =>
     const subtotal = item.quantity * item.unitCents
 
     if (item.prorated) {
-      return total + subtotal - item.discountCents
+      return total + subtotal
     }
 
     return total + subtotal - item.discountCents

expectedFindings.semanticSummary: prorated invoice items skip discountCents while non-prorated items subtract it, so discounted prorated items are overcharged
